ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data */,
  "seafloor_age" REAL /* Age of the seafloor in million years */,
  "subduction_volume_km3y" REAL /* Volume of subduction in km^3/y */,
  "decompacted_sediment_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of decompacted sediment in m */,
  "sed_thick_0.2d" REAL /* Thickness of sediment at 0.2 degrees distance from the trench in m */,
  "ocean_crust_carb_percent" REAL /* Percentage of carbon in the ocean crust */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., research paper, survey, sensor reading) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was updated */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth of the region */,
  "geological_features" TEXT /* Description of significant geological features in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model or statistical method used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the analysis (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being visualized */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization created */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the visualization */,
  "visualization_params" TEXT /* Parameters used to create the visualization */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption or description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset related to the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being responded to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was provided */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the response was provided */,
  "response" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution status of the query (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was submitted */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
